subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The letter thou hadst addressed to His honour Áqá Siyyid Taqí was noted. The glad-tidings of the promotion of God's Faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق مکتوبی که بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از خبر ترویج دین الله
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @growth of the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution
